hooks.command: cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && python -m pyright backend/ --outputjson 2>/dev/null | python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); e=d.get('generalDiagnostics',[]); [print(f'TYPE ERROR: {x[\"file\"]}:{x[\"range\"][\"start\"][\"line\"]} {x[\"message\"]}') for x in e if x['severity']=='error']; sys.exit(1 if any(x['severity']=='error' for x in e) else 0)" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Type check failed — review before continuing'

echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python -c "import json,sys; cmd=json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''); dangerous=['rm -rf','drop table','delete from','truncate']; found=[d for d in dangerous if d in cmd.lower()]; print(f'BLOCKED dangerous command: {found}') if found else None; sys.exit(2 if found else 0)"
cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && echo '---' && echo 'Session ending. Run /context-dump to update CLAUDE.md status before closing.'
